items.statcast_observation: Salvador Perez produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.9 mph at a 14.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Baltimore Orioles, KC 2, BAL 8. Lane Thomas led the night, 3-4 | 2B, RBI in the latest Royals game. Salvador Perez supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.9 mph.
items.title: Royals at Orioles Recap
